post_conditions.condition: Blockfrost API key, ROOT_KEY, OWNER_PKH, and custodial wallet derivation material must not appear in any JSON error payload, Inertia flash message, or HTTP redirect parameter returned to the browser under any error or exception condition.
post_conditions.evidence: FIXED (commit 6775b40): StudentMintController.php and CertificateController.php updated. All $e->getMessage() values captured in local variables and passed only to Log::error()/Log::warning(). All $json['error'] values (lines 311, 355, 436 in StudentMintController.php) assigned to local $error var and passed to Log::warning() only. All HTTP responses return only generic user-safe messages. No API keys, ROOT_KEY, OWNER_PKH, or derivation material can appear in any client-facing response.

post_conditions.condition: Error responses returned by the ADA purchase, Stripe purchase, airdrop, self-mint, and refund flows must contain no database schema names, file system paths, PHP class names, Node.js module paths, Blockfrost error codes, or transaction builder internals.
post_conditions.evidence: FIXED (commit 6775b40): StudentMintController.php error paths return fixed-string messages ('Transaction build failed. Please try again.', 'Mint transaction submission failed. Please try again.'). CertificateController.php all catch blocks return generic messages ('Certificate operation failed. Please try again.', 'An error occurred while processing...', etc.). No database schema names, file system paths, PHP class names, Node.js module paths, or Blockfrost error codes present in any client-facing HTTP response.

post_conditions.condition: Node.js web3 scripts must return only transaction hex, UTxO data, or structured success/error JSON to stdout. ROOT_KEY, private derivation paths, and OWNER_PKH must not appear in any value written to stdout, stderr, or any log file accessible outside the container.
post_conditions.evidence: build-certificate-tx.mjs: stdout uses process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(returnObj)) with only status/cborTx/nftName/serialNum/mph fields; errors output only err.message to stdout JSON without echoing env vars; console.error used for debug only. minting-policy.mjs reads OWNER_PKH from process.env but does not write it to stdout.

acceptance.criterion: A malformed CIP-30 wallet address submitted to self-mint endpoint is rejected with a 422 before any web3 script is invoked.
acceptance.evidence: StudentMintController.buildMintTx validates 'changeAddr' with regex:/^[0-9a-fA-F]+$/ at line 229 and utxos.*  regex:/^[0-9a-fA-F]+$/ at line 232 — validation runs before exec()

acceptance.criterion: A transaction built by the server has a TTL no greater than current slot + 300 slots at the time of building.
acceptance.evidence: build-certificate-tx.mjs uses TTL_MINUTES env var (default 30 minutes), not 300 slots (~5 minutes). The contract says ≤300 slots but the code uses 30 * 60 * 1000 ms window. Whether TTL_MINUTES is configured to ≤5 in production cannot be verified from source alone.
